task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all S3 bucket names defined in the Resources section
solution_criteria: Function should accept a CloudFormation JSON template as input and return a list of S3 bucket logical IDs or physical names. Must handle nested resource definitions.

task: Create a JSON IAM policy document that allows an AWS Lambda function to read from a specific DynamoDB table and write logs to CloudWatch
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy with appropriate Action statements (dynamodb:GetItem, dynamodb:Query, logs:CreateLogGroup, logs:CreateLogStream, logs:PutLogEvents), Resource ARNs, and Effect set to Allow. Must be properly formatted JSON.

task: Write a regex pattern to match and extract AWS EC2 instance IDs from AWS CLI output or log files
solution_criteria: Pattern should match EC2 instance IDs in the format i-0123456789abcdef0 (i- followed by 17 hexadecimal characters). Should work for multiple instances in a single string and avoid false positives.
